transactions.desc: The Dodgers signed Espinal to a contract Friday, Maddie Lee of the Los Angeles Times reports.
The Tigers reinstated Brieske (thigh) from the 60-day IL on Friday.
The Giants reinstated Webb (knee) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start against the Rockies on Friday.
The Giants activated Lee (back) from the 10-day injured list, and he will start in right field and bat sixth against the Rockies on Friday, Justice delos Santos of The San Jose Mercury News reports.
The Marlins recalled Ekness from Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday.
The Marlins optioned Pauley to Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday, Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports.
The Marlins activated Jimenez from the 7-day concussion injured list Friday,Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports.
The Phillies recalled Hoffman from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Friday.
The Phillies recalled Berroa from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Friday.
The Phillies optioned Kemp to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Friday.
The Orioles optioned Weston to Triple-A Norfolk on Friday.
The Orioles signed Suarez to a major-league contract Friday.
The Royals recalled Cerantola from Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
The White Sox recalled Gilbert from Triple-A Charlotte on Friday.
The Guardians selected Fairchild's contract from Triple-A Columbus on Friday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Cardinals selected Velazquez's contract from Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Cardinals optioned Prieto to Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Cardinals recalled Crooks from Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Cardinals optioned Pozo to Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Pirates activated Jones (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Friday.
Pittsburgh designated Lawrence for assignment Friday.
The Rays designated Heasley for assignment Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Rays selected Wantz's contract from Triple-A Durham on Friday.
The Rays optioned Williams to Triple-A Durham on Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Rays activated Williamson (back) from the 10-day injured list Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Reds selected Marte's contract from Triple-A Louisville on Friday.
Atlanta recalled Molina from Triple-A Gwinnett on Friday.
Atlanta designated Carrasco for assignment Friday.
The Twins activated Laweryson (forearm) from the 15-day injured list Friday.
The Twins recalled Funderburk from Triple-A St. Paul on Friday.
